generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring motor phase currents."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder placed behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

// C10: Data (measured traces)
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace I_M streamed in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft angle trace r_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel angle trace r_G from secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

// C10: Computed data from calculation models
instance ComputedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data calculated from motor current using TorqueComputationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ComputedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor encoder angles via VelocityComputationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ComputedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from velocity data via AccelerationComputationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, DataTraceGenerationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment executing friction and dynamic simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ParameterEstimationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling providing engineering block definition and internal block diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelManagementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell exposing digital twin assets and interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceGenerationService, VisualizationService
]

instance VisualizationDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard presenting measured and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ProcessManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tooling that orchestrates the twinning workflow across models, simulations and data."
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification (static, kinetic, viscous) using streamed data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, UpdateControllerParametersAction,
                     DeviationHighlightInsight, ScheduleMaintenanceAction
]

instance ParameterEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic estimation of parameters for white‑box and black‑box friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualizing measured and simulated traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataTraceGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of data traces for further analysis and archival."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceInsight
]

instance EngineeringModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of SysML engineering models (block definition, internal block diagrams)."
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages the four‑step purpose‑driven methodology for digital twin evolution."
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessEvolutionInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction parameters are produced and can be fed back to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy."
]

instance DeviationHighlightInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviations between simulated and measured behavior are highlighted for maintenance decision making."
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters for white‑box and black‑box friction models are automatically estimated."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Measured and simulated data are visualized side‑by‑side in a unified dashboard."
]

instance DataTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated data traces enable further offline analysis and reporting."
]

instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SysML engineering models describe motor and gearbox structure for the digital twin."
]

instance TwinningProcessEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Iterative refinement of the digital shadow through problem identification, model analysis, simulation, and data identification."
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed estimated friction parameters back to the SINUMERIK 840D controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger maintenance workflow based on detected deviations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models (Engineering and Simulation)
instance SysMLMotorGearboxBlockDefModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLMotorGearboxIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram representing component connections of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of frictionless behavior of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computation of torque from measured current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance VelocityComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computation of angular velocity from encoder angle derivatives."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computation of angular acceleration from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C20: Physical component under study
instance FirstAxisMABIMAX100 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, a gearwheel gearbox and a cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisMABIMAX100
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of an Asset (first axis), Sources (sensors and derived signals), Processing components (simulation models executing friction calculations), DataTraces (measured and simulated), and a dashboard that aggregates and visualizes the results. The Processing component consumes input traces, applies simulation models, and produces output traces for analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the operated phase of the robot, using engineering models (structure) and runtime sensor data to create a live representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point to its origin and processing component ensures model fidelity. Both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models are validated by comparing simulated torque/velocity against measured traces. Multi‑physics awareness and continuous re‑identification address wear and temperature effects."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; the communication is one‑way (physical‑to‑virtual) as defined for digital shadows."
]
